# Extracao: transcription_mp4_4__Invites

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_4__Invites.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Invites. Look, people love invites. John, the next time you're in Miami, come see me. Come see me for dinner. Me, you, the wife, the kids will go to dinner. We'll do... You know what we'll do? We'll do lunch at the beach. We'll do dinner that night. Even if they pass, it's an investment in this personal contact. Or maybe you want to tell people, look, I have limited number of seats for an exclusive briefing on a new product release. Maybe it's a client that just hits your website. I have two seats open. We would love to invite you to it. Again, think creatively, okay? Think creatively about how you can really impress someone with an invite immediately after they've contacted either your website, your phone, or come to visit your showroom floor. Look, I'd like you to be my guest at this event that we have coming up. It's two months away. It doesn't have to be an immediate invite. It could be two months, three months, six months. It could be next year. It's impressive. People love the invites. Use them as a way to follow up.
